title: Show Me What You Got port
description: Ports the popular mod SMWYG by Apace to 1.21.1
body:
Ports the popular mod SMWYG to fabric 1.21.1

A simple mod which allows displaying your items to other users in chat.

While in your inventory, hold ctrl and then press your chat key while hovering over an item to share it. (so Ctrl+T by default).

Your chat window will open with the linked item inside. Feel free to write a message before or after the item (or both) before sending!

The mod should be installed on the client and the server in order to function properly.

Clients without the mod can still see items shared by others with the mod in chat, but can't share items themselves. 

This was ported from the version 1.21.3 of the original SMWYG by Apace.

*This mod has a known bug that fails to display the item in chat box. I do not specialize in UI and rendering and can't find the issue.

Bug report: See discord - DM Nynst
